steps.assistant_text: Busted the 1.0f-immediate CSE: target materializes 1.0f into two FP regs ($f2 for 0x54/0x58, $f4 for 0x5C) but IDO folds all three into $f2. Spelling the odd 0x5C store's constant as (float)1 (cast) vs 1.0f for the others hashes to a distinct FP pseudo, emitting the fresh mtc1 at,$f4. Same lever as the 0.0f (float)0 CSE-break.

metadata.verification: make RUN_CC_CHECK=0 + cmp tenshoe.z64 baserom.z64 clean; objdiff fuzzy 100.0
